name: stockyard-rateshield
description: Rate limiting and request queuing for LLM APIs. Token bucket algorithm with configurable limits per-key, per-model, or per-user.

tools.name: rateshield_limit_status
tools.description: Get current rate limit status: remaining requests, tokens, reset time.

tools.name: rateshield_queue_stats
tools.description: Get request queue statistics: queued, processing, rejected, avg wait time.

tools.name: rateshield_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the RateShield proxy is running and healthy.
